purpose: Fixed category-balanced product-quality evaluation. Never use these cases for training or checkpoint selection.

categories.label: Dominant pitched waveform identity
categories.focus: Recover the clearly dominant non-noise oscillator waveform.

categories.label: Audible pitched detune
categories.focus: Recover a substantial detuned pitched oscillator without confusing slot assignment.

categories.label: Audible noise
categories.focus: Recover audible noise identity and its balance against pitched content.

categories.label: Quiet mix
categories.focus: Avoid dropping low-level oscillator content or over-amplifying the rendered result.

categories.label: Envelope extreme
categories.focus: Recover long or abrupt envelope behavior that materially changes perceived shape.

categories.label: Filter or resonance extreme
categories.focus: Recover strongly constrained cutoff or resonance behavior.
